title: Teramico Premium Ceramic Glazed Plant Pot - 100% Frost-proof & Handmade. Flower Pot with Hole for Outdoor and Indoor Use. High-quality Planter, Unique, Winterproof (Lava Brown, 38 cm x 31 cm)
features: Perfect dimensions: your pot has an outer diameter of 38 cm and a height of 31 cm. Available in many sizes (20-60cm) and colours - choose the ideal variant for your plant.
Real unique: each planter is elaborately handmade. Slight variations in shape and colour as well as dimensional tolerances of +/- 1 cm are quality features of real craftsmanship.
️ 100% frostproof: our high-quality ceramic defies any weather! With guaranteed water drainage, the pot can survive even harsh winters outdoors. Durable and robust.
HEALTHY PLANTING: A bottom hole prevents waterlogging. Professional tip: first a drainage layer, then a separating fleece and fill the soil on it. This keeps the roots healthy.
Outdoor note: outdoors the container must be placed on feet (sold separately from us). This allows water to drain freely and frost damage caused by accumulating moisture is avoided.
Indoor suitability: thanks to its timeless design, also perfect for indoor use. Please use a matching coaster (sold separately) to protect your floor from water.
Stylish eye-catcher: Whether patio, balcony or living room - the high-quality glaze and classic shape skilfully set your plants in the spotlight. A long-lasting highlight for your home.
description: Product Description Premium design plant pot - high-quality ceramic for indoor and outdoor use Frost-proof stoneware, handmade & durable - exclusive structures Handmade for eternity - premium stoneware instead of mass-produced goods Add character to your garden. Our planters are more than just containers: They are solid design objects, made of high-quality stoneware at extreme temperatures. Unlike conventional terracotta or plastic, they impress with their uncompromising quality: 100% frost-proof: The material is fired so tightly that it does not freeze in winter. Extreme robustness: Solid workmanship, shockproof and durable. Healthy growth: The thick-walled ceramic insulates the roots; the bottom hole prevents waterlogging. Sustainability: A pure natural clay product that will last a lifetime. OUR QUALITY PROMISE: High-quality materials and careful workmanship More than just a pot - a real design statement. Timeless elegance: Your premium ceramic pot Give your plants the home they deserve. Our ceramic combines traditional craftsmanship with modern design and becomes a stylish eye-catcher - whether in the living room, on the balcony or the terrace. Robust quality for all seasons Unlike simple pottery, our ceramic is fired at extremely high temperatures (stoneware quality). This makes the pot particularly resistant to shocks and weather influences. • Frost proof: With guaranteed water drainage, it can easily survive cold winters outdoors. • UV resistant: The high-quality surface does not fade and retains its colour intensity for years. Healthy growth thanks to drainage Optics are not everything - the function must be right. Each pot has an essential bottom hole. This ensures that excess watering or rainwater can drain and reliably prevents waterlogging and root rot on your plant. Our expert recommendation for healthy plant growth How to plant correctly: The 4-layer system To ensure that your plants thrive magnificently and the pot remains frost-proof even in winter, the right interior construction is crucial. Waterlogging is the most common reason for root rot and frost damage. Follow our proven scheme for healthy plants: 1. SECURE DRAIN Place a domed clay shard over the bottom hole. This prevents soil from clogging the hole and water accumulating in the pot. 2. Drainage layer Fill the bottom (approx. 10-15% of the pot height) with expanded clay, gravel or clay shards. This layer ensures that the roots never stand directly in the water ("wet feet"). 3. TRENNVLIES Place a gardener fleece or a piece of jute bag on the drainage. It separates the layers and prevents fresh potting soil from trickling into the stones and blocking the drain. 4. PLANTING SOIL Fill the pot with high-quality soil and insert your plant. Leave a pouring edge of approx. 1-2 cm free. Everything from one cast: Stylishly coordinated accessories The perfect accessory: Functional and stylish To ensure that your ceramic lasts for a long time, we offer matching accessories in white, anthracite, blue and green. THE INVISIBLE POT FEET A distance from the floor is safe for the pot outdoors. Thanks to the special triangular wedge shape, our feet can be placed so that they are completely invisible from the outside and your pot floats visually. • Frost protection: Prevents the pot from freezing to the ground in winter. • Drainage: Water drains off, waterlogging is effectively avoided. • Air: The bottom under the pot can breathe. THE MATCHING COASTERS For indoor or delicate patios, our glazed plates are ideal. They catch watering water safely and reliably protect your floor from stains and scratches. Indoors, it serves as a completely waterproof saucer for your plant pots. The robust glaze ensures that no drop of water seeps through and reliably protects your floors and window sills. Outdoors, it unfolds its second nature: Use it as a decorative bird bath or water bowl on the terrace and balcony. The smooth, glazed surface is easy to clean and keeps the water fresh for your feathered garden visitors. A handmade piece of ceramic that adapts to your needs. Unshakably stable: Secure stand in wind and weather No more tipped plants after the next autumn storm. Thanks to the solid wall thickness and the high burning temperature, our stoneware containers have an extremely high weight. This ensures a deep centre of gravity that reliably holds your plants on the ground - a decisive advantage over lightweight plastic or fibre pots. Stormproof: The pots remain stable even in strong gusts of wind, without additional weight. Ideal for high trunks: Provides the perfect counterweight for large, top-heavy plants such as bamboo, olive trees or high oleander.Tilt-proof: Maximum safety on your patio, even if pets or children are romping in the garden. Thoughtful design: Stress-free and gentle repotting Do you know the frustrating problem with conventional bulbous pots? The root ball grows under the inward curved edge and the plant can only be freed by force or by destroying the pot. Our vessels solve this problem with their linear inner shape without annoying edge. Effortless removal: When it's time for a larger pot, the root ball slides out easily and without resistance. Root gentle: Fine roots are not torn off when pulled out; the plant grows faster at the new location. Easy to clean: The smooth inner walls can be cleaned hygienically and quickly before replanting. VIBRANT COLOR VARIETY: Brilliant glazes with deep effect Give your rooms and patio a very personal touch. Our collection impresses not only with its shape, but above all with its extraordinary colour palette. From timeless classics to modern trendy colours, here you will find exactly the tone that makes your interior shine. Thanks to the high temperature firing, glazes of unique quality are created: Radiant shine: The thick, glazed surface reflects the light and provides a fascinating play of colours with elegant depth effect. Perfect combination: Whether harmoniously tone-on-tone or as a conscious colour contrast - design your green oasis according to your taste. Long-lasting brilliance: Our colours are 100% UV resistant. Even after years in the blazing sun, nothing fades here, the luminosity remains forever. 100% pure nature: Plastic-free gardening with a clear conscience Make a contribution to a greener future. In a world full of short-lived plastics, we rely on the power of nature. Our ceramic is not only a visual highlight, but a conscious decision against the "disposable culture". NO MICROPLASTIC: Unlike plastic pots that become brittle by UV radiation and release particles into the environment, our stoneware is made of pure, natural clay. Colourfast and UV-resistant: The colours do not fade even after years in the blazing sun - the brilliance is retained. Resource-saving: A pot that lasts for decades does not need to be replaced. This is the most honest form of sustainability. Heavy ceramic pots such as the Bavaria are also ideal for large plants Easy repotting Beautiful colours Ecologically meaningful
